chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. D — 794 of 2017. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 29.03.2022 FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Agha Waqar Ahmed Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Asstt. Attorney General. Syed Shahzad Ali Shah along with Faiz ur Rehman AEFO/KOT and Mubashir Divisional Personal Officer Karachi. The matter pertains to alleged outstanding service dues. It is not disputed that an amount of commutation / gratuity in the sum of Rs.161695/-, G.P. Fund Rs.37748/-, arrears of pension of Rs.47923/-, difference of commutation / gratuity Rs.26430/- and some differential amount towards the Railway quarter in the sum of Rs.25000/- was paid undisputedly through cross cheque. The petitioner, notwithstanding the receipt of the above amount, has now requested for the release of the amount which was withheld on account of punishment in the reduction of time scale by two steps which allegedly was set-aside by the concerned Ministry. This is not a forum where such adjudication could be addressed. The Tribunal apparently is a competent forum to claim the amount in case the punishment has been set-aside and if the petitioner is so found entitled. The purpose of this petition is being served in view of the above outstanding amount which is not disputed by the petitioner. The petition accordingly dismissed. In case petitioner is aggrieved that any additional amount is being withheld in view of punishment which was subsequently recalled, he may approach the relevant forum which include Tribunal, if so advised by the counsel. JUDGE JUDGE
